title: Screen Stats
description: Lightweight Fabric HUD showing time, FPS, coords, biome, weather, and calendar.
body:
## 📊 Screen Stats

**Screen Stats** is a minimalist HUD mod for Minecraft that shows all essential information directly on your screen. See everything at a glance without opening menus. Perfect for survival, building, or exploring.  

![HUD overview screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c412c48b8c6ca19c65172f2deb473f16e064142.jpeg)

---

## ✨ Features

### 🕒 World Time
Quickly know the current in-game time. See when night is coming or when the sun is rising without checking the clock.  


### 🎮 FPS Counter
Keep an eye on your game performance. Instantly see if your FPS drops so you can adjust settings or troubleshoot lag.  


### 📍 Coordinates (Toggle: Z)
Know exactly where you are. Instantly check X, Y, and Z positions to navigate, mark locations, or share coordinates with friends.  

![Coordinates screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04d8b865e36a08466502a2e4cf7f249d8a30772.png)

### 📅 Calendar (Toggle: C)
See the current in-game day and month at a glance. Plan events, track farming cycles, or just keep track of time in your world.  

![Calendar screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7645bbf3b094e1717f8f3d75d070b6f70f9207.png)

### ⛅ Weather & Biome (Toggle: X)
Always know your environment. See the current biome and weather: clear, rain, or thunder. Plan your activities or prepare for storms without surprises.  

![Weather & Biome screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/568c58ddac1c728d6b961d2aa99c3ab9044ecb8a.png)

![Weather & Biome screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27883f5b77d4cab722f903615385a8ad525dfb23.png)
---

## 🎨 Customization

Make the HUD fit your style. Change colors, transparency, and scale to match your screen and preferences. Highlight important info in the colors you like.  

![Customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fa49ed0a9404a5940e8066db5b2da6fa87f994.png)

---

## ⌨️ Controls

- **Z** — Show or hide coordinates  
- **C** — Show or hide calendar  
- **X** — Show or hide weather & biome  

Everything is instantly visible, easy to read, and customizable to your taste.
